message:
feat(lab): add cancellation injection integration with oracles

Add LabInjectionRunner and related types for comprehensive
cancel-correctness testing at every await point, integrated
with the Lab runtime's oracle system.

- LabInjectionConfig for configuring injection strategy and oracles
- LabInjectionRunner for running injection test campaigns
- LabInjectionReport for aggregating results with oracle verification
- LabBuilder for convenient test setup with the lab() helper function
- Remove unused imports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
